## User Story

As a `<user type>`, I want `<capability>` so that `<outcome>`.

## Context

Describe the workflow, user, tenant, or operational scenario.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given `<context>`, when `<action>`, then `<result>`.
- [ ] Tenant and condominium boundaries are respected.
- [ ] Sensitive data handling is documented.
- [ ] Basic tests or validation steps are included.

## Design And UX Notes

Add screenshots, references, copy, or interaction notes when relevant.
